text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Can you please provide more information about your environment? Are you 
working on -CURRENT (10.0) or on 9.1 (as shown in the PR)? Please 
provide the options set for blender (make showconfig) and also check, if 
the system's clang compiler works properly in contrast to the clang 
port.
